# tapps-brain

> Persistent cross-session memory system for AI coding assistants

- Version: 3.14.4
- License: MIT
- Homepage: https://github.com/wtthornton/tapps-brain

## Tech Stack

- Python >=3.12
- Node.js
- Pydantic
- uv (package manager)
- GitHub Actions

## Entry Points

- `tapps-brain` -> `tapps_brain.cli:app`
- `tapps-brain-http` -> `tapps_brain.http_adapter:main`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/markdown_it/main.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/typer/main.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/annotated_doc/main.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/typer/cli.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/tqdm/cli.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/huggingface_hub/inference/_mcp/cli.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pygments/__main__.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/typer/__main__.py`
- `.venv-tag-smoke/lib/python3.12/site-packages/tqdm/__main__.py`

- `.env.example`
